chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 174 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference application as notice not issued, cost not paid, copies not supplied by advocate for appellant 30.01.2026 Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of applicant which is taken on record. Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
